title: salpianthus aequalis
intro: Salpianthus aequalis, also known as the golden buttons plant, is a flowering plant native to North America, characterized by its clusters of small, golden flowers and heart-shaped leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Salpianthus aequalis include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Salpianthus aequalis may include teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat a range of health conditions.
